name: Parmesan-Crusted Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound each chicken piece to a thickness of 1/2 inch between sheets of waxed paper.
2. Place the chicken in a baking dish.
3. Pour 4 tablespoons lemon juice over the chicken and turn to coat. Let stand for 10 minutes.
4. Beat eggs with remaining 1 tablespoon lemon juice in a medium bowl.
5. Combine breadcrumbs, Parmesan, and lemon peel in a shallow dish.
6. Dip one chicken breast into the egg mixture, then dip into breadcrumbs to coat. Gently shake off excess coating.
7. Season with salt and pepper. Repeat with remaining chicken, egg mixture, and breadcrumbs.
8. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
9. Add 1/3 of the chicken to the skillet and saute until golden brown and cooked through, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to a platter and keep warm.
10. Repeat with remaining chicken in two more batches, adding 1 tablespoon butter with each batch.
11. Garnish the platter with lemon wedges and serve.
